subject: [PATCH 4/8] mm: use zone lock guard in set_migratetype_isolate()

reviews.author: Dmitry Ilvokhin
reviews.summary: No comments from Dmitry Ilvokhin on their own patch.

2026-03-06.patch_summary: This patch series aims to improve the Linux kernel's memory management by introducing a zone lock guard in set_migratetype_isolate(). The change replaces an explicit lock/unlock pattern with automatic scope-based cleanup, ensuring that dump_page() remains outside the locked section and avoiding potential lockdep splats.

reviews.author: Dmitry Ilvokhin

2026-03-12.patch_summary: This patch series aims to improve the zone lock handling in the mm subsystem, specifically in the set_migratetype_isolate() function. The goal is to replace explicit lock/unlock patterns with automatic scope-based cleanup using a scoped lock guard. This change is intended to simplify the code and avoid potential lockdep splats.
